key_findings: Zero CPO providers within 30 km in all three underserved regions
Nearest CPO is 130-200 miles away — beyond reasonable care access
Only 30 Phase 3 trials (4.7%) across 644 studies — wide evidence gap
76.5% academic-sponsored vs 16.8% industry — limited commercial innovation
MS Delta has highest amputation rates yet worst care access (livability: 2.1/10)
All three states (WV, KY, MS) have not expanded Medicaid
